title: Verify Pause Trial updates UI to paused design
description: Test that when user pauses their trial, the Trial Corner and homepage widget update to reflect paused state with appropriate design
preconditions: User is on Trial Corner page

steps.description: 3. If pop-up appears, click 'Pause' to confirm
4. Observe UI changes on Trial Corner
5. Navigate to homepage and observe widget

expected_result: Trial Corner and homepage widget update to paused design, all content sections become locked
